title: Simple Rotten Flesh to Leather
description: A simple mod that allows you to smelt rotten flesh into leather at furnaces and smokers.
body:
A simple mod that allows you to smelt rotten flesh into leather at furnaces and smokers, giving a new use to an otherwise commonly thrown away item, making the librarian book grind more interesting while being less tedious, and making early-game leather armor a reasonably obtainable option.

![In-Game Smoker Recipe from Recipe Book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ndELyZuM/images/7ad95cc58e5c12374da794a7f851a1530b0a07b2.png)
